title: RF26W/A-N5 cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity of RF26W/A-N5 is 26 kW.

title: RF26W/A-N5 heating capacity
summary: Nominal heating capacity of RF26W/A-N5 is 28 kW (with 5.4 kW auxiliary heat).

title: RF26W/A-N5 power supply
summary: Power supply for RF26W/A-N5 is 380V 3N ~ 50Hz.

title: RF26W/A-N5 compressor type
summary: Compressor type for RF26W/A-N5 is fully enclosed scroll, quantity 2.
evidence_quote: 型式 全封闭涡旋压缩机 压缩机 数量 (台) 2

title: RF26W/A-N5 refrigerant
summary: Refrigerant for RF26W/A-N5 is R22.

title: RF26W/A-N5 expansion device
summary: Expansion device for RF26W/A-N5 is capillary tube.

title: RF26W/A-N5 indoor unit dimensions
summary: Indoor unit dimensions for RF26W/A-N5: width 1200 mm, depth 400 mm, height 1850 mm.
evidence_quote: 宽 mm 1200 深 mm 400 高 mm 1850

title: RF26W/A-N5 outdoor unit dimensions
summary: Outdoor unit dimensions for RF26W/A-N5: width 1150 mm, depth 360 mm, height 1600 mm.
evidence_quote: 宽 mm 1150 深 mm 360 高 mm 1600

title: Fault code E1: Compressor high pressure protection
summary: E1 indicates compressor high pressure protection.

title: Fault code E2: System anti-freeze protection
summary: E2 indicates system anti-freeze protection.

title: Fault code E3: Compressor low pressure protection
summary: E3 indicates compressor low pressure protection.

title: Fault code E4: Compressor discharge temperature protection
summary: E4 indicates compressor discharge temperature protection.
evidence_quote: E4 压缩机排气温度保护

title: Fault code E5: Compressor overload protection
summary: E5 indicates compressor overload protection.

title: Fault code F0: Indoor ambient sensor fault
summary: F0 indicates indoor ambient temperature sensor fault.
evidence_quote: F0 室内环境传感器故障

title: Fault code F1: Evaporator 1 sensor fault
summary: F1 indicates evaporator 1 temperature sensor fault.
evidence_quote: F1 蒸发器1传感器故障

title: Fault code F2: Condenser 1 sensor fault
summary: F2 indicates condenser 1 temperature sensor fault.
evidence_quote: F2 冷凝器1传感器故障

title: Fault code F3: Outdoor ambient sensor fault
summary: F3 indicates outdoor ambient temperature sensor fault.
evidence_quote: F3 室外环境传感器故障

title: Fault code F5: Discharge temperature sensor 1 fault
summary: F5 indicates discharge temperature sensor 1 fault.
evidence_quote: F5 排气温度传感器1故障

title: Fault code F9: Supply fan thermal overload
summary: F9 indicates supply fan thermal overload.

title: Fault code EC: Communication fault
summary: EC indicates communication fault.

title: Fault code EE: Memory chip fault
summary: EE indicates memory chip fault.

title: High pressure protection trigger
summary: High pressure protection triggers when pressure switch detects 3.0 MPa, resets at 2.4 MPa.

title: Low pressure protection trigger
summary: Low pressure protection triggers at 0.05 MPa, resets at 0.15 MPa.

title: Discharge temperature protection threshold
summary: Discharge temperature protection triggers above 130°C, resets below 90°C after 3 minutes stop.
evidence_quote: 连续30秒检测到排气温度高于 130℃时...压缩机停足3分钟后，若排气温度小于90℃时，系统恢复运行

title: Anti-freeze protection trigger
summary: Anti-freeze protection triggers when evaporator temperature ≤ -2°C for 3 minutes, resets at ≥10°C after 3 minutes stop.
evidence_quote: 当连续3分钟检测到T蒸≤-2℃时...当压缩机停了3分钟且T蒸≥10℃时，指示停止闪烁，消除故障代码

title: Temperature setting range
summary: Temperature setting range is 16-30°C, default 25°C.
evidence_quote: 设定温度范围为 16－30℃, 初值为 25℃

title: Compressor minimum off time
summary: Compressor has a 3-minute minimum off time before restart.
evidence_quote: 一旦停机，须延时 3分钟才能再次启动

title: Compressor minimum run time
summary: Compressor once started runs at least 6 minutes regardless of temperature.
evidence_quote: 压缩机一旦启动，在 6分钟内不随温度变化而停机

title: Outdoor unit installation tilt limit
summary: Outdoor unit tilt must not exceed 0.7° along length and 0.5° along width.
evidence_quote: 机组安装后沿长度方向上倾斜度不大于0.7º,沿宽度方向上倾斜度不大于 0.5º

title: Indoor unit installation tilt limit
summary: Indoor unit tilt must not exceed 0.7° along length and 0.5° along width.
evidence_quote: 确保地面水平，机组安装后沿长度方向上倾斜度不大于0.7º,沿宽度方向上倾斜度不大于 0.5º

title: RF35W cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity of RF35W is 35 kW.

title: RF45W cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity of RF45W is 45 kW.

title: RF50W cooling capacity
summary: Nominal cooling capacity of RF50W is 50 kW.
